hey: Wa alaikum assalam wa rahmatullahi wa barakatuh
name: LuminaDeen
Battle of Yamamah: More than 700 Huffaz (those who have memorized the Quran) were martyred in the Battle of Yamamah [Reference: Sahih al-Bukhari 4986]
Who is clutch:
🔥 Ahmed is the ultimate clutch. 🔥

The guy who shows up when it matters most and gets it done — no panic, no excuses, just results. The ultimate savior, the one you call when things go sideways and somehow walk away with everything fixed. ⚡💪

That's clutch. That's Ahmed.
